chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 222 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 01.10.2025 Syed Nadeem Haider Shah, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- In respect to the maintainability, learned Counsel for the applicant files statement along with the following cases contending that earlier application(s) having been dismissed for non-prosecution, the criminal proceedings require re-entertainment by way of filing another application of the same nature:  PLD 1970 Supreme Court 177  2011 P Cr. L J 344  2000 YLR 1293  1999 P Cr. L J 1870 Irrespective to the same, learned Counsel for the applicant further contended that overt acts having been indulged into by the respondents subsequent to passing of the order impugned in the matter, the present Criminal Miscellaneous Application be disposed of with the available ground to the applicant to approach the concerned Court in respect to his grievance of abuse of concession of bail. Ordered accordingly. Matter stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
